Angular Distance Matrix for Orientation Vectors

Source: R/vector_stats.R
sph-dist.Rd

This function computes and returns the distance matrix computed by using the Cosine similarity to compute the distances between the rows of a data matrix.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'Vec3'
dist(x, ...)

# S3 method for class 'Line'
dist(x, ...)

# S3 method for class 'Ray'
dist(x, ...)

# S3 method for class 'Plane'
dist(x, ...)

# S3 method for class 'Pair'
dist(x, ...)

Arguments

x

object of class "Vec3", "Line", "Ray", "Plane", "Pair", or "Fault", where the rows are the observations and the columns are the coordinates.

...

optional parameters passed to stats::as.dist()

Value

distance matrix

Examples

set.seed(20250411)
dist(rvmf(100, mu = Line(90, 0), k = 20))
#>               1           2           3           4           5           6

#> 3     5.2851849  18.6946975
